title: oberonia teres
intro: Oberonia teres, also known as the terrestrial Oberonia, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid, which means it grows in the ground, and is native to tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Oberonia teres include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be harnessed through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts.
